events.consensus: 8:30am ET (Census). Schedules DIFFER (7/15 vs 7/16 — confirm live). Headline m/m consensus is an ESTIMATE. Consumer-demand read landing before OPEX; control-group feeds the Q2 GDP nowcast. XLY Weakening (1m RS −0.85, tangled, −0.6% below its 200-day) — a soft print confirms the consumer wobble.

Pin-prob nudged to 0.58 (VIX low/falling, tape near highs = calm-pinning base case) — offset by the dense pre-expiry cluster (CPI/PPI/retail) any of which can break the level first.

Straddle ~6% STALE — refresh.

psychology.read: REGIME (named): a calm, positive-gamma, COMPLACENT risk-on bull near all-time highs — SPY bull-stacked, −0.9% off its 52-week high, +8.7% over a rising 200-day, VIX 16.05 falling for a 4th read. This is STRUCTURALLY a bull; the composite score reads 0 only because Fear&Greed was unfetchable this run (VIX-only). Two features sit ON TOP of the frame without changing it: (1) a FRESH, still-shallow leadership rotation — financials/defensives (XLF/XLV/XLI/XLU) Lead on 1-month RS but their 3-/6-month RS are NEGATIVE, so tech (XLK 3m RS +20) remains the structural RS leader and the intraday 'rotation out of tech' is NOT confirmed (the XLK 1m-RS wobble oscillated −0.59→−0.53→−0.94→−0.81 = noise, fails the persistence gate); and (2) one genuine structural CRACK — MSFT is bear-stacked, −30% off its high and −14% below its 200-day, the AI-capex 'show-me' de-rate at the single-name level, but so far IDIOSYNCRATIC (the AI-semis VGT/SPMO are bull-stacked near highs). CROWD POSTURE: complacent and short-vol into a KNOWN dense catalyst cluster (30y auction today → CPI/PPI/retail 7/14-16 → OPEX 7/17 → FOMC+MSFT 7/29); chasing the 1-month sector rotation; and having left MSFT for dead. FALSIFIERS of this read: (1) SPY losing its 50-day (~739) = first structural crack; (2) MSFT's weakness SPREADING to QQQ/VGT (idiosyncratic → systematic) = the real topping tell; (3) VIX inverting to backwardation (IVTS >1.0); (4) a HOT CPI (7/14) breaking the OPEX level. Net posture: STAY LONG the structural trend, carry a CHEAP hedge into the cluster, trade the fresh rotation as a bounded swing (not a regime change), and do NOT treat MSFT's downtrend as a dip.
inputs: Breadth structurally broad: 10 of 11 sectors bull-stacked; only XLC bear-stack (−4.0% below 200-day), XLY tangled (−0.6%)
Leadership FRESH not entrenched: XLF +5.61 / XLV +4.54 / XLI +3.22 / XLU +3.10 on 1-month RS, but ALL have negative 3-/6-month RS
Tech still the structural RS leader: XLK 3-month RS +19.96, 6-month +17.92, price +22.1% over its 200-day, despite a −0.81 1-month-RS wobble
Persistence gate: XLK 1-month RS oscillated −0.59→−0.53→−0.94→−0.81 across 4 reads = NOISE (no persistent direction), NOT a rotation signal
XLF 1-month RS a PERSISTENT 3-read climb (4.15→4.86→5.89, now 5.61) = a real swing signal, but 3m/6m RS negative = fresh, not structural
MSFT 379.61 BEAR-stack: −6.1% below the 50-day, −14.0% below the 200-day, mom126/252 −20.3% / −23.0%, −29.5% off its 52-week high
MSFT idiosyncratic so far: QQQ/VGT/SPMO bull-stacked near highs (200d +13.6% / +19.1% / +21.9%) — the complex is NOT dragged down
VIX 16.05 — a PERSISTENT 4-read decline (16.9→16.74→16.57→16.05) = deepening complacency; term structure carried contango (IVTS ~0.85)
ENERGY the tactical worst: XLE 1-month RS −6.85 (deteriorating), but 6-month RS +13.07 and +8.1% over its 200-day = crude-fade, not structural break
Event cluster: 30y auction imminent (1pm today) → CPI 7/14 → PPI 7/15 → retail 7/15-16 → OPEX 7/17 → FOMC+MSFT 7/29
Fear&Greed NOT fetched this run (CNN bot-blocked) — sentiment band unknown, not assumed
psychology.tiltOnProbabilities: STRUCTURE-FIRST, anti-reactive: the fresh Tier-A MA/long-horizon slice re-frames the whole book. The intraday XLK RS wobble is DEMOTED to a do-nothing (fails the persistence gate; tech is the structural leader). The financials rotation is a bounded SWING, not a leadership change (negative 3m/6m RS). MSFT is elevated to a top STRUCTURAL card — a downtrend, not a dip. Event odds: solid 30y auction 0.55 base (tape near highs, VIX falling), tail 0.30 the cleanest negater given how complacent/extended the tape is. CPI kept 28/46/26 (fading oil tail removes the headline bias; a hot print is the low-odds/high-impact tail an unhedged, extended tape is exposed to). OPEX pin 0.58 (VIX low, near highs) but levels STALE 7/6. MSFT miss shaded heavier for sell-the-news asymmetry in a show-me AI-capex tape, reinforced by its structural downtrend. All labeled estimates seeded from FRESH Tier-A bars + STALE options (7/6) + unverified consensus — re-seed the options/consensus live.

QQQ.status: $722.18 — BULL-STACK (20>50>200), +1.3% over the 50-day (~713), +13.6% over the 200-day (~636), −3.1% off its 52-week high (~745); mom63 +19.3, mom252 +31.4. Structurally a core long in an intact uptrend; the 1m/5-day momentum (+0.96 / −0.41) is a flat intraday pause, NOT a trend change. Structural hold-or-fail is the 50-day (~713) / the ~711 prior gap base. Add on strength, don't chase.

SPMO.status: $154.12 — the STRONGEST structural trend in the book: bull-stack, +4.1% over the 50-day, +21.9% over the 200-day, mom63 +27.2, mom252 +39.7, only −4.7% off its 52-week high. The purest momentum/quality long; 5-day −0.77 is intraday noise inside a powerful uptrend. Carries the most factor beta into any CPI surprise — the cheap hedge is the offset.

VGT.status: $117.88 — BULL-STACK, +2.7% over the 50-day, +19.1% over the 200-day, mom63 +27.7, mom252 +41.1, −6.2% off its 52-week high. The AI-semis/tech proxy and the STRUCTURAL counter-tell to MSFT: VGT is near highs while MSFT is −30% off its high, so the AI-capex weakness is (so far) name-specific, not sector-wide. Watch VGT's bull-stack as the line that says 'MSFT stays idiosyncratic'; a break would mean the de-rate is spreading.

MSFT.status: $379.61 — BEAR-STACK, the structural laggard: −6.1% below the 50-day (~404), −14.0% below the 200-day (~441), mom126/252 −20.3% / −23.0%, −29.5% off its 52-week high (~538). A genuine DOWNTREND (AI-capex 'show-me' de-rate), NOT a dip — the 50-day (~404) is first RESISTANCE. mom21 ticked up slightly (−8.0→−7.8) = a tactical bounce inside the downtrend. A two-sided EVENT trade into the 7/29 FOMC-day print; implied move ~6% STALE (7/6). Do not catch the knife — wait for a 50-day reclaim.

experimental.title: Mega-cap structural-breakdown vs index-at-highs divergence detector (idea)
experimental.note: Method: flag when a top-weight name is in a structural DOWNTREND (bear-stack, below its 200-day, deeply off its 52-week high) WHILE the index / its own sector ETF is bull-stacked near highs (this run: MSFT −14% below its 200-day, −30% off its high, bear-stack; QQQ/VGT bull-stacked near highs). Quantify the divergence (name 200-day distance − ETF 200-day distance, plus the 52-week-range gap) and base-rate the forward outcome: does the name mean-revert UP to the index (idiosyncratic, buy the eventual 50-day reclaim) or does the index roll over TO the name (systematic top, since the biggest weight leads the cap-weighted index)? Inputs: the Tier-A structural slice (maStack, ma200Dist, pctFrom52wHigh) — now computed per name + the ETFs. This run it is the single most important structural read and the OLD brief missed it entirely. Promote if recurring.

experimental.title: Fresh-vs-entrenched rotation classifier: 1-month RS leading while 3/6-month RS lag (idea)
experimental.note: Method: classify a sector's leadership as FRESH (1-month RS positive/Leading but 3- and 6-month RS negative — this run: XLF/XLV/XLI/XLU) vs ENTRENCHED (all three horizons positive — this run: none of the tactical leaders; tech is the structural RS leader). Base-rate the forward outcome: does a fresh rotation persist (3-month RS climbs >0 = durable handoff) or fade (1-month RS rolls back = head-fake)? Turns 'rotation' from a one-number snapshot into a horizon-aware, falsifiable call. Inputs: the Tier-A rsMom1m/3m/6m per sector (now emitted). Directly frames this run's 'trade the rotation as a swing, not a regime change.' Promote if recurring.

experimental.title: Persistence-gated RS-change detector (noise vs signal) (idea)
experimental.note: Method: for each momentum/RS series, compute the tail consecutive-same-direction run across the last N brief-history snapshots (the rlbrief.js consecutiveRun/isPersistentSignal helpers) and only surface a 'change' when the run is ≥ minRun OR a structural level breaks. This run is a live proof: XLK 1m RS oscillated −0.59→−0.53→−0.94→−0.81 = a length-1 tail run = NOISE, so 'tech rotated out' is not actionable, whereas XLF's 4.15→4.86→5.89 is a length-2+ run = a real swing signal. Base-rate the hit-rate of persistence-gated vs raw single-slice signals to quantify how much whipsaw the gate removes. Inputs: brief-history.jsonl (have) + the pure helpers (have, selftest-covered). Promote to a visible 'signal quality' badge if recurring.

experimental.title: Complacency-into-catalyst gauge: persistent VIX decline + event density (idea)
experimental.note: Method: combine a PERSISTENT VIX decline (this run: 16.9→16.74→16.57→16.05, a 4-read fall) with a forward event-density count over the next ~10 trading days (this run: auction today + CPI/PPI/retail + OPEX + FOMC/MSFT = very dense) and the index's distance from its ATH (−0.9%) to score a 'priced-for-perfection' complacency reading — the setup where cheap protection has the best risk/reward. Base-rate forward drawdown conditioned on high-complacency-into-high-event-density. Inputs: ^VIX series + macroEvents[] + Tier-A pctFrom52wHigh (all have). Frames this run's 'carry a cheap hedge' call. Promote if recurring.

experimental.title: VIX term-structure regime flag: contango→backwardation cross (idea)
experimental.note: Method: track IVTS = VIX/VIX3M (and VIX9D/VIX) daily; flag the cross of IVTS through 1.0 (contango→backwardation) as a regime-change trigger, with day-count of the current regime and a base-rate study of forward SPX returns / realized-vol after each cross. This run's whole calm read hinges on the curve STAYING in contango (IVTS ~0.85 carried); backwardation is the named falsifier. Inputs: ^VIX/^VIX9D/^VIX3M (add VIX9D/3M to the Tier-A fetch). Promote if recurring.
